summary: This podcast episode features William Reid from Divore Capital discussing his personal journey overcoming substance abuse, faith, and personal development. The content focuses on mindset, discipline, identity, and life philosophy rather than multifamily real estate investing, deal analysis, or market-specific strategies relevant to Brian Norton's business.
takeaways: Implement 12-week business planning cycles instead of 12-month plans to create urgency and accountability (March 31st deadlines instead of December 31st)
Pick 4-5 high-quality conferences per year and buy the best ticket available to access high-level networks, not for general information
Maintain consistent follow-up pressure on contractors/consultants through kind, gentle check-ins while maintaining project momentum, especially through holidays
Micromanage until you can trust—reliability is the determining factor in professional relationships and team promotion
Pain motivation typically outweighs pleasure motivation for actual behavior change and goal completion
Identify root causes through detailed life timeline exercises (blocks of time from childhood to present) to reprogram subconscious beliefs
Don't identify people by their problems—reframe identity positively (e.g., 'person with alcohol problem' not 'alcoholic')

skill_candidates.change: Implement immediate 90-day planning cycles with weekly task execution instead of annual planning to increase execution velocity
skill_candidates.evidence: Justin explains 12-week year methodology creates urgency: 'you give somebody a year, what do they take? A year...if you can create urgency...by March 31st, not December 31st...you basically build four years in one'

skill_candidates.change: Establish regular follow-up cadence on critical path items during year-end periods rather than giving grace breaks that extend timelines
skill_candidates.evidence: Will discusses maintaining pressure on civil engineer through holidays: 'I always try and maintain pressure...giving the grace usually the week before and the week after the big holidays...but I try and just keep the throttle'

skill_candidates.change: Implement immediate post-conference action by selecting 2-3 specific takeaways and adding them to task list within 24 hours rather than trying to implement entire curricula
skill_candidates.evidence: Justin states: 'I'm taking that booklet and going through it and implementing probably two to three...I don't try and take a ton. Two to three major things...that's been the biggest difference for me...taking action immediately'

title: How These Men Beat Addiction For Good!
